---
title: "[LANGUAGE] Quest Track"
subtitle: "Your descriptive subtitle here"
track-id: "trackname"           # lowercase, no spaces
track-icon: "🔷"                 # Choose an appropriate emoji
track-color: "#6366f1"          # Primary color for this track
difficulty: "Beginner"          # Beginner | Intermediate | Advanced
total-quests: 0                 # Number of lessons in track
estimated-hours: 0              # Total learning time
format:
  live-html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.hero}
# {{< meta track-icon >}} Welcome to {{< meta title >}}!

*Your compelling introduction here - What makes this track exciting?*
:::

## 🎯 About This Track

[Brief description of what students will learn and why it matters]

### What You'll Master

- ✅ Core concept 1
- ✅ Core concept 2
- ✅ Core concept 3
- ✅ Real-world applications

### Prerequisites

::: {.callout-note}
## Before You Begin

**Recommended background:**
- [Link to prerequisite track](../othertrack/index.qmd) (optional but helpful)
- Basic understanding of programming concepts

**New to programming?** [Start here](../../intro/what-is-cs.qmd)!
:::

---

## 🗺️ Your Learning Path

This track contains **{{< meta total-quests >}} quests** organized into progressive sections.

<div class="quest-grid">

::: {.quest-card}
### 📚 Foundation (Quests 1-X)
Master the fundamentals

- Variables and data types
- Control flow
- Functions
- Core concepts

**Estimated time:** X hours
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🎯 Practice (Quests X-Y)
Apply what you've learned

- Build mini-projects
- Solve challenges
- Practice patterns

**Estimated time:** X hours
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🚀 Mastery (Quests Y-Z)
Advanced techniques

- Complex applications
- Best practices
- Professional skills

**Estimated time:** X hours
:::

</div>

---

## 🚀 Quick Start

Ready to begin your adventure? Choose your path:

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-info}
### Option 1: Start Quest 1 →

Jump right in! Our interactive lessons let you code in your browser.

[Begin Quest 1 →](lessons/01-first-lesson.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-success}
### Option 2: Setup Local Environment

Prefer working locally? Get set up first.

[Setup Guide →](setup.qmd){.btn .btn-success}
:::

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-warning}
### Option 3: Explore All Quests

See the full curriculum before starting.

[View All Quests →](all-quests.qmd){.btn .btn-warning}
:::

---

## 💻 Interactive Features

::: {.feature-grid}

::: {.feature-card}
### 🎮 In-Browser Coding
Edit and run code directly in each lesson
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### 📓 Downloadable Notebooks
Practice offline or in your preferred environment
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### 🎯 Challenges & Solutions
Test your skills with guided exercises
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### 📊 Progress Tracking
Monitor your advancement through quests
:::

:::

---

## 🎓 Who Is This For?

::: {.audience-grid}

::: {.audience-card}
### 🌟 Complete Beginners
No prior experience? Perfect! We start from the basics.
:::

::: {.audience-card}
### 📚 Students
Supplement your coursework with interactive practice.
:::

::: {.audience-card}
### 💼 Career Switchers
Learn marketable skills for tech careers.
:::

::: {.audience-card}
### 🔧 Developers
Add a new language to your toolkit.
:::

:::

---

## 🏆 What You'll Build

By completing this track, you'll create:

1. **Project 1 Name** - Description
2. **Project 2 Name** - Description
3. **Project 3 Name** - Description
4. **Final Capstone** - Comprehensive application

---

## 📚 Track Resources

::: {.resource-links}
- [📖 All Quests Overview](all-quests.qmd)
- [🔧 Setup & Installation](setup.qmd)
- [📥 Download All Materials](downloads.qmd)
- [💻 Interactive Environment](interactive.qmd)
- [❓ Track FAQ](faq.qmd)
- [📝 Practice Exercises](exercises.qmd)
:::

---

## 🎯 Learning Tips

::: {.tip-box}
### 💡 Make the Most of This Track

1. **Code along** - Type every example yourself
2. **Experiment** - Try modifying the code to see what happens
3. **Challenge yourself** - Attempt puzzles before checking solutions
4. **Practice daily** - Even 10 minutes helps!
5. **Build projects** - Apply concepts to your own ideas
:::

---

## 🤝 Community & Support

::: {.callout-tip}
## Need Help?

- 💬 [Discussion Forum](#) - Ask questions, share projects
- 📧 [Email Support](mailto:obonhamcarter@allegheny.edu)
- 📖 [FAQ](faq.qmd) - Common questions answered
- 🐛 [Report Issues](https://github.com/obonhamcarter/CS_Quest_Adventures/issues)
:::

---

## ➡️ Ready to Begin?

Your quest awaits! Click below to start your first adventure:

::: {.cta-large}
[🚀 Start Quest 1: [Topic Name]](lessons/01-first-lesson.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
:::

Or [view all quests →](all-quests.qmd) to see the complete learning path.

---

::: {.footer-note}
**About This Track**

Created by [Oliver Bonham-Carter](https://www.oliverbonhamcarter.com)  
Department of Computer and Information Science, Allegheny College  

Questions? [obonhamcarter@allegheny.edu](mailto:obonhamcarter@allegheny.edu)
:::
